title: COVID-19 global lockdowns — WHO declares pandemic
description: WHO declares COVID-19 a pandemic on March 11, 2020. Within days, major economies enter lockdown closing all non-essential businesses. The S&P 500 enters the fastest bear market in history (-34% from peak). CARES Act ($2.2T) signed March 27. Airlines grounded, retail shuttered, white-collar workforce shifts to remote work.
